title: Protect an R2 Bucket with Cloudflare Access
excerpt: title: Protect an R2 Bucket with Cloudflare Access description: You can secure access to R2 buckets using Cloudflare Access, which allows you to only allow specific users, groups or applications within your organization to access objects within a bucket. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. You can secure access to R2 buckets using [Cloudflare Access](https://developers.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-one/access-controls/applications/http-apps/).
